![Wyoming's numbering plan area and area code (blue)](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/d/db/Area_code_WY.png)

Wyoming's numbering plan area and area code (blue)

**Area code 307** is the telephone [area code](/wiki/NPA_code "NPA code") in the [North American Numbering Plan](/wiki/North_American_Numbering_Plan "North American Numbering Plan") for the entire [U.S. state](/wiki/U.S._state "U.S. state") of [Wyoming](/wiki/Wyoming "Wyoming").[[1]](#cite_note-:0-1) It is one of the 86 [original North American area codes](/wiki/Original_North_American_area_codes "Original North American area codes") created by the [American Telephone and Telegraph Company](/wiki/American_Telephone_and_Telegraph_Company "American Telephone and Telegraph Company") (AT&T) in 1947.[[1]](#cite_note-:0-1)

Wyoming's sparse population has not required more than one area code for the state. As of May 2025, it was one of only eleven states with only one area code.[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*]

## Service area
